content.rendered:
Hi there!

Thank you so much for supporting Uusi kielemme! People like you make it possible for me to keep up this website. I’m happy you appreciate my work enough to help me out financially.

I’m so grateful for your support. I can’t thank you enough!

excerpt.rendered: Thank you so much for supporting Uusi kielemme! People like you make it possible for me to keep up this website.
